decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today, removing visibility into intraday direction or macro catalysts. Cash sits at $477.14 — just below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position sizing. With a healthy +31.6% portfolio gain and 6 solid positions already held, the right call is to stay pat and let existing momentum plays run rather than force action in an information vacuum.

market_education.summary_en: No market data was available today, meaning price action and headline catalysts cannot be assessed with confidence. In the absence of reliable signals, the neutral designation reflects a data gap rather than genuine market equilibrium. Institutional traders in similar conditions typically reduce new position sizing and tighten stop disciplines until clarity returns.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據無法取得，無法可靠評估價格走勢或消息面催化劑。在缺乏有效信號的情況下，「中性」走勢實際上反映的是資料缺口，而非真正的市場均衡狀態。在類似情境下，機構交易員通常會縮減新倉規模，並收緊停損紀律，靜待市況明朗。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: An information edge means acting on data or insight that others don't yet have — or simply waiting when reliable data is absent. Today's unavailable market data is a real-world example: without a clear edge, adding new positions introduces unnecessary risk. Knowing when NOT to trade is as important as knowing when to trade.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「資訊優勢」是指基於他人尚未掌握的數據或洞見進行交易，或在可靠資料缺失時選擇等待。今日市場數據無法取得，正是現實中的典型案例：在沒有明確優勢的情況下新增倉位，只會帶來不必要的風險。知道何時「不交易」，與知道何時進場同樣重要。
